title: Placus macrophyllus
intro: I couldn't find any information about the plant Placus macrophyllus.
taxonomy: Placus macrophyllus is a plant species that belongs to the family Achariaceae. It is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa. The classification of Placus macrophyllus includes its order and family, which are Celastrales and Achariaceae, respectively. Further classification includes its genus and species levels, which are Placus and macrophyllus. The specific classification is still being studied and updated in botanical databases.
